category_sources: source_facts.description says ftnchek is a Fortran 77 program checker; the official manual identifies ftnchek as a Fortran 77 program checker.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official ftnchek site and primary documentation/download surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive provide official project/download locations, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official ftnchek manual describe checking Fortran 77 programs.
